  uid=2_0 StaticText "How to play?"
  uid=2_1 button
  uid=2_2 StaticText "PAYOUTS"
  uid=2_3 StaticText "SUPER CHICKEN COIN"
  uid=2_4 StaticText "Activates the "
  uid=2_5 StaticText "Collect Feature"
  uid=2_6 StaticText " and can also trigger the "
  uid=2_7 StaticText "Chicken Boost Feature"
  uid=2_8 StaticText " in both the Main and Bonus Game. During the Bonus Game, it collects all values from Chicken Coin on the screen."
  uid=2_9 StaticText "CHICKEN COIN"
  uid=2_10 StaticText "Triggers the "
  uid=2_11 StaticText "Collect Feature"
  uid=2_12 StaticText " in both game modes."
  uid=2_13 StaticText "BONUS COIN"
  uid=2_14 StaticText "Activates the "
  uid=2_15 StaticText "Bonus Game"
  uid=2_16 StaticText " when appearing on reels 1 and 3, together with a Chicken or Super Chicken Coin on reel 2. Carries random multiplier values. Appears only on reels 1 and 3."
  uid=2_17 StaticText "3"
  uid=2_18 StaticText "x"
  uid=2_19 StaticText " - "
  uid=2_20 StaticText "30.00"
  uid=2_21 StaticText "Substitutes for all symbols except Bonus, Chicken, and Super Chicken."

  uid=2_54 StaticText "PAY LINES"
  uid=2_55 StaticText "Winning combinations pay from "
  uid=2_56 StaticText "left to right"
  uid=2_57 StaticText " on active paylines only. 
Only the "
  uid=2_58 StaticText "highest win"
  uid=2_59 StaticText " per line is paid. 
The number of active lines is fixed at 8."
  uid=2_60 StaticText "COLLECT FEATURE"
  uid=2_61 StaticText "When "
  uid=2_62 StaticText "Super Chicken Coin"
  uid=2_63 StaticText " and "
  uid=2_64 StaticText "Chicken Coins"
  uid=2_65 StaticText " appear together with any "
  uid=2_66 StaticText "Bonus Coins"
  uid=2_67 StaticText ", the "
  uid=2_68 StaticText "Collect Feature"
  uid=2_69 StaticText " is triggered.

During this feature, all values from Bonus, Chicken, and Super Chicken Coins are summed up and added to the total win from the spin (or from the Bonus Game if active).

In the Bonus Game, a "
  uid=2_70 StaticText "Super Chicken Coin"
  uid=2_71 StaticText " also gathers the values of all "
  uid=2_72 StaticText "Chicken Coins"
  uid=2_73 StaticText " and other "
  uid=2_74 StaticText "Super Chicken Coins"
  uid=2_75 StaticText " that appear during the same spin."
  uid=2_76 StaticText "CHICKEN BOOST FEATURE"
  uid=2_77 StaticText "When a "
  uid=2_78 StaticText "Super Chicken Coin"
  uid=2_79 StaticText " appears on the reels, it can activate the "
  uid=2_80 StaticText "Chicken Boost Feature"
  uid=2_81 StaticText ", awarding one of several random bonuses:

 • "
  uid=2_82 StaticText "Multiplier Boost"
  uid=2_83 StaticText ": applies a random multiplier of ×2, ×3, ×5, ×7, or ×10 to the Super Chicken Coin’s value during the same spin.

 • "
  uid=2_84 StaticText "Jackpot Trigger"
  uid=2_85 StaticText ": instantly attaches a random Jackpot prize to the Super Chicken Coin.

 • "
  uid=2_86 StaticText "Extra Coins"
  uid=2_87 StaticText ": adds 2, 3, or 5 Bonus Coins with random values to the reels."
  uid=2_88 StaticText "BONUS GAME"
  uid=2_89 StaticText "The "
  uid=2_90 StaticText "Bonus Game"
  uid=2_91 StaticText " starts when "
  uid=2_92 StaticText "Bonus Coins"
  uid=2_93 StaticText " land on reels 1 and 3, and a "
  uid=2_94 StaticText "Chicken"
  uid=2_95 StaticText " or "
  uid=2_96 StaticText "Super Chicken Coin"
  uid=2_97 StaticText " lands on reel 2.

Rules:

 • Only Bonus, Chicken, and Super Chicken Coins appear during this mode.
 • Each coin displays either a value or a jackpot.
 • The round begins with "
  uid=2_98 StaticText "3 spins"
  uid=2_99 StaticText ".
 • Every time a Bonus, Chicken or Super Chicken Coin lands, the spin counter resets to 3.
 • The game continues until all spins are used or all grid positions are filled.
 • When the feature ends, all visible Chicken and Super Chicken Coin values are collected and added to the total payout."
  uid=2_100 StaticText "JACKPOTS"
  uid=2_101 StaticText "During the Main Game and the Bonus Game, one of four "
  uid=2_102 StaticText "random jackpots"
  uid=2_103 StaticText " can be triggered."
  uid=2_104 StaticText "MINI"
  uid=2_105 StaticText "JACKPOT"
  uid=2_106 StaticText "25x"
  uid=2_107 StaticText " bet"
  uid=2_108 StaticText "MINOR"
  uid=2_109 StaticText "JACKPOT"
  uid=2_110 StaticText "50x"
  uid=2_111 StaticText " bet"
  uid=2_112 StaticText "MAJOR"
  uid=2_113 StaticText "JACKPOT"
  uid=2_114 StaticText "150x"
  uid=2_115 StaticText " bet"
  uid=2_116 StaticText "GRAND"
  uid=2_117 StaticText "JACKPOT"
  uid=2_118 StaticText "1000x"
  uid=2_119 StaticText " bet"
  uid=2_120 StaticText "PILE OF GOLD FEATURE"
  uid=2_121 StaticText "Whenever a "
  uid=2_122 StaticText "Bonus Coin"
  uid=2_123 StaticText " lands during the Main Game, it may randomly activate the "
  uid=2_124 StaticText "Pile of Gold Feature"
  uid=2_125 StaticText ".

This feature drops extra "
  uid=2_126 StaticText "Bonus"
  uid=2_127 StaticText ", "
  uid=2_128 StaticText "Chicken"
  uid=2_129 StaticText ", or "
  uid=2_130 StaticText "Super Chicken Coins"
  uid=2_131 StaticText " onto the reels - just enough to help trigger the Bonus Game."
  uid=2_132 StaticText "BUY BONUS GAME"
  uid=2_133 StaticText "Players can instantly access the Bonus Game by purchasing it for a fixed cost:

 • "
  uid=2_134 StaticText "75 bets"
  uid=2_135 StaticText " - starts the Bonus Game with one or more Chicken Coins.

 • "
  uid=2_136 StaticText "200 bets"
  uid=2_137 StaticText " - includes additional Chicken Coins and an increased chance for higher wins.

 • "
  uid=2_138 StaticText "300 bets"
  uid=2_139 StaticText " - starts with guaranteed "
  uid=2_140 StaticText "Super Chicken Coins"
  uid=2_141 StaticText " and activates the "
  uid=2_142 StaticText "Chicken Boost Feature"
  uid=2_143 StaticText "."
  uid=2_144 StaticText "Malfunction voids all pays and plays"
